theorem: For every atlas branch (r, k, λ) with r ∈ {0, 1716, 4862, 16302, 17160}, k ∈ [1, 100] \ base_enriched(r), and B^eff_{r,k,λ} = 3, the primitive cofactor Z_{r,k,λ}(u) is never a perfect square. Consequently the shape requirement τ(Z) ≤ 3 on this branch collapses to 'Z prime or Z = 1'.
